result:
The task has been completed successfully. The cleaned dataset has been created with the following steps:

1. Loaded all four input files from data/input/ directory:
   - wave_one_lsype_young_person_2020.tab (Wave 1, Age 14)
   - wave_four_lsype_young_person_2020.tab (Wave 4, Age 17)
   - ns8_2015_derived.tab (Wave 8, Age 25 - contains W8DBMI)
   - ns9_2022_derived_variables.tab (Wave 9, Age 32 - contains W9DBMI)

2. Merged all files using full_join by NSID to establish the full cohort

3. Created bmi25 from W8DBMI and bmi32 from W9DBMI with proper missing value harmonization:
   - -9 = Refusal
   - -8 = Don't know/insufficient information
   - -1 = Item not applicable
   - -2 = Script error/lost
   - NA values recoded to -3 (Not asked/interviewed)

4. Applied labelled class with appropriate labels for missing value codes

5. Output only NSID, bmi25, bmi32 variables to data/output/cleaned_data.csv

The output file data/output/cleaned_data.csv contains the cleaned BMI data for the cohort.
